title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Yamato, Robin, Kaido as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I OVERDID IT A BIT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Easy there, Robin-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Tokage Port - Upon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't you guys get it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a whole month's worth of food!! If you don't pay me back in full, I'll be screwed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's crazy you can carry that much food on you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kehehehehehehe~ My swamp-swamp fruit's capacity is boundless!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat! If you're feeling better, please give us an update on what's happening on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happened to our captain and Bepo's group?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TraF... Much much chew chew chew chew chew chew chew chew chew chew chew chew Chew... Whoop Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I can do it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How can you ask that of me?!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: That place is too Dan- GEROUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not going to let you go back there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flower capital... no, all of wano will be destroyed unless we act!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I do it, you'll never be able to return to normal, and you'll still have the heart and mind of a child!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care about that! Please, your help could transform me into a bigger dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I beg of you, Shinobu! Use your ripe-ripe Jutsu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...to make me an adult!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Such unwavering resolve!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
